Main table → Arithmetic → Absolute

Absolute

Instruction Type and Width          Instruction description
                                    Performs two absolute operations. For each single absolute
                                    operation, the source is 16-bit, the destination are either 16-bit
Vector Absolute 16-bit Word Parts   or 20-bit determined by the vector register type. The two
                                    operation results are packed into either 32-bit or 40-bit
                                    destination, respectively.
                                    Produces the absolute value of a source. The source and the
Vector Absolute 32-bit              destination are either 32-bit or 40-bit wide determined by the
                                    vector register type.
